ssa_niit_mismatch.description: SSA + 1099-B combinations — NIIT/Additional Medicare Tax MAGI

savers_credit_overcredit.description: agi_aggregator was not routing AGI to form8880; node defaulted to agi=0 and always applied 50% rate

w2g_gambling_agi_missing.description: W-2G node not routing box1_winnings to agi_aggregator via line8z_other

foreign_tax_credit_missing.description: schedule3.line1_foreign_tax_1099 was not accumulable; multiple FTC deposits rejected

f2441_dep_care_routing.description: correct.json was missing EITC ($415); engine was correct

odc_regression.description: Fixed by adding full_time_student=true (case 93 dependents) and taxpayer_provided_over_half_support=true (case 96 parent) to input.json files so the new ODC qualifying tests pass.

f1099m_other_income_residual.description: f1099m box3_other_income is now flowing into AGI (AGI correct for both cases). Residual tax discrepancies remain: case 72 engine $10,961 vs expected $10,927 (delta $34, likely SSA taxable amount affected by extra $225.75); case 95 engine $309,967 vs expected $312,560 (delta $2,593, likely K1/LTCG rate or NIIT interaction with extra $68,245).

self_employed_health_insurance.description: self_employed_health_insurance node ($1,000 premium) deduction not reducing AGI. Engine computes AGI ~$124,258 vs expected lower value; total_tax is $21,240 vs correct $14,444 (delta $6,796 overpay). Deduction should flow to Schedule 1 line 17 (self-employed health insurance).

ira_deduction_missing.description: ira_deduction_worksheet node not routing IRA deduction to AGI reduction. Engine shows taxable=$38,500 (no IRA deduction applied) instead of correct $31,500 (after $7,000 IRA deduction). Also affects savers credit calculation.

excess_aptc_repayment.description: f1095a excess APTC repayment not being added to tax liability. Engine tax $2,054 vs correct $2,500 (delta $447). Excess APTC repayment should flow to Schedule 2 line 2 and add to total tax.

sep_ira_qbi_missing.description: sep_retirement node ($13,758 SEP-IRA) and QBI deduction not reducing taxable income. Engine tax $15,538 vs correct $0 (amount owed scenario). SEP deduction reduces AGI; QBI deduction (20% of QBI after SE/SEP adjustments) further reduces taxable income.
